aside.span: Illustrator, Android Themer, Webmaster, 3D Designer, Developer, Blogger

div.p: Have a project in mind or just want to say hi? Drop me a line!

b:class.cond: not (data:enableBlog and (data:view.isPost or (data:view.isMultipleItems and not data:view.isHomepage)))
b:class.name: cat-hidden-sidebar

div.p: Meow! It looks like the cat knocked this page off the table. The link you followed might be broken or the page may have been removed.

I am a multidisciplinary creator working at the intersection of illustration, web design, 3D design, and Android customization. My work fuses creativity and technology, bringing both functional and immersive designs to life.
Whether designing from scratch or working with frameworks, I create websites that are both visually appealing and highly functional. Beyond design, I contribute to the open-source community by translating projects into Turkish and automating software environments.

a.p: Showcasing creative and functional apps built with a focus on user experience and UI themes, including Lavien Adaptive Icon Packs.
Developing modern, responsive digital experiences using HTML5, CSS3, WordPress, and JS frameworks like Swiper.js.
Creating bold expressive digital art, 3D game assets, and visualizations inspired by culture and storytelling.
Writing insightful content for Haymatlos and scripting complex automated software deployment tasks using AutoIt and Batch.
Designing intuitive interfaces and prototyping modern experiences tailored for both mobile and desktop platforms.
Configuring, maintaining, and automating secure server deployments using modern hosting environments.
Bringing still graphics to life with smooth animations and engaging video editing techniques.
Optimizing web content to rank higher on search engines and ensuring maximum digital visibility.
Description for your new service goes here. Explain what you do briefly.
Description for your new service goes here. Explain what you do briefly.
Description for your new service goes here. Explain what you do briefly.
Description for your new service goes here. Explain what you do briefly.

div.p: A powerful backup solution for Windows utilizing NTFS Hard links, featuring Time Machine style incremental backups.
A comprehensive Android customization tool and icon pack family tailored for seamless and elegant design.
Clean and modern bootloader interfaces including Papirus and Sheffield themes.
Open access societal publishing platform and community content management.
An automation script designed to help developers deploy server environments faster and safer.
A collection of stylized 3D models and textures built specifically for indie game developers.
A zero-code, modern, responsive, and single-page portfolio theme for Blogger, inspired by the soothing Catppuccin color palette.
A fully responsive e-commerce web platform developed for a local creative business agency.
Brief description of your new project, what it does, and what technologies you used.
Brief description of your new project, what it does, and what technologies you used.
Brief description of your new project, what it does, and what technologies you used.
Brief description of your new project, what it does, and what technologies you used.
The blog is currently empty. The cat is sleeping for now, but new content will be published here soon!

div.noscript: Please enable JavaScript to view the comments powered by Disqus.

div.style: margin-top: auto; padding-top: 1rem; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 1rem; flex-wrap: wrap;
